# neon_branches (Data Source)

Retrieves the list of branches for a Neon project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "neon_branches" "example" {
  project_id = "your-project-id"

  query = {
    search     = "main"
    sort_by    = "name"
    sort_order = "asc"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String) The Neon project ID.

### Optional

- `query` (Attributes) Query parameters for filtering and sorting branches. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--query))

### Read-Only

- `branches` (Attributes List) The list of branches. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--branches))

<a id="nestedatt--query"></a>
### Nested Schema for `query`

Optional:

- `search` (String) Search by branch name or ID.
- `sort_by` (String) Sort field. Possible values are `name`, `created_at`, `updated_at`.
- `sort_order` (String) Sort order. Possible values are `asc`, `desc`.


<a id="nestedatt--branches"></a>
### Nested Schema for `branches`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) A timestamp indicating when the branch was created, in RFC 3339 format.
- `current_state` (String) The current state of the branch.
- `id` (String) The branch ID.
- `name` (String) The branch name.
- `parent_id` (String) The parent branch ID.
- `updated_at` (String) A timestamp indicating when the branch was last updated, in RFC 3339 format.
